edge_status.message: No directional edge proven yet — backtested hit-rate ~49% (<= coin flip after costs). Tips are analytics/context, NOT validated signals. Default stance: abstain.

disclaimer: Anvil Live produces calibrated probabilities and ranges from live market data for ANALYTICS & EDUCATION only. It is NOT investment advice and makes NO guarantee of profit. Predictions are uncertain; act at your own risk. Read-only — no orders are ever placed. Reliability is tracked honestly and shown openly so you can judge for yourself before trusting any tip.
